question: For each building, return the address of the building and the name of the region it belongs to.
sql: SELECT building.Address, region.Name FROM building JOIN region ON building.Region_ID = region.Region_ID

back_translation.intent: 获取建筑物地址和区域名称的关联信息

semantic.reason: 语义完全一致，原始问题要求获取每个建筑物的地址和所属区域名称，SQL反向翻译描述中的意图、涉及的表、列均与之匹配，无过滤、聚合、分组或排序要求。
